query:
SELECT
            (payload->>'value')::float8 AS "value!",
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ts_coided))::bigint AS "age_secs!: i64"
        FROM core.events
        WHERE source = 'sinex'
          AND event_type = 'metric.gauge'
          AND payload->>'name' = 'event_engine.consumer.lag.pending'
        ORDER BY id DESC
        LIMIT 1
